login.title: Welcome back, please sign in to your account

passkey.notFound: Passkey not found. Please check if it has been registered or deleted.
passkey.webauthnNotSupported: Your browser does not support passkeys

qr.scanned: Scan successful, please confirm on your phone
qr.scanHint: Use SubLinks mobile app to scan

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactor.description: For your account security, please enter your verification code

logout.title: Session Expired
logout.message: Your session has expired or been terminated. Please log in again.

oauthConfirm.title: Create Account
oauthConfirm.description: Set up your username to complete registration
oauthConfirm.usernameHint: 2-32 characters, letters, numbers, underscores and hyphens only

device.title: Authorize Device
device.description: Sign in to authorize your client application
device.closePage: You can safely close this tab and return to the app
device.expired: This authorization link has expired. Please request a new one from the app.
device.banner: You are signing in to authorize a client application
device.secureHint: Tokens transmitted securely via encrypted channel

deviceConfirm.title: Authorization Request
deviceConfirm.requestDesc: A client is requesting to sign in to your account
deviceConfirm.warning: If you did not initiate this login request, do not authorize.
deviceConfirm.deniedDesc: This client will not be able to sign in to your account.
deviceConfirm.expiredDesc: This authorization link has expired or is invalid. Please try again from the client.
deviceConfirm.ipMismatchDesc: The client IP ({clientIp}) does not match your browser IP ({browserIp}).
deviceConfirm.ipMismatchWarning: Do NOT authorize if this wasn't you!
